page.title: Accountants
page.description: As a freelancer you may not always need an accountant, but when you do, it helps to get a trusted recommendation. Here you'll find accountants recommended by other users — and you can add your own.
card.label: Recommend an accountant
list.empty: No recommendations yet. Be the first!
list.recommended-by: {count, plural, one {# person recommended} other {# people recommended}}
recommend.form.title: Recommend an accountant
recommend.form.name: Name
recommend.form.name.placeholder: John Smith or Smith Accounting Ltd
recommend.form.contact.required: At least one contact method is required
recommend.ineligible: You're not eligible to recommend yet. Please try again later.
recommend.already-recommended: You have already recommended this accountant.
recommend.limit: You can only recommend one accountant.
